mechanics.excerpt: All positive traits list point value which must be paid out of your Character Points Negative traits list negative values; when you buy negative trait for your character, you get more points to spend on posi- tive traits or higher Attributes_ For example_ the Amnesia Trait value of - If you take it for your character; YOu can also take 3-point positive trait such as Toughness or three 1-point traits , Or YOu may spend three extra points on Attributes_ Iist of traits iS included for reference below: Complete descriptions of all the traits appear in the Traits section_ Traits marked on the list in boldface can only be acquired dur- ing initial character creation character can sometimes end up with equivalent effects through game play; such as earning money (Wealth) r making friends (Contact), but these are not represented by traits paid for with Character Points_ Other traits can be acquired after character creation Character Points can also be spent t0 get rid of negative traits that were picked up during the Life Path However, there should be justification in the character' $ story for how this occurred; if the gamemaster feels the explanation isn: ade quate , the trait may not be removed: Negative traits can be acquired after character creation through game play; but they do not earn Character Points For example .
